_comment: Build-time config for index.html (read by the @yuneta/gobj-ui html-transform Vite plugin). title + metadata + Content-Security-Policy connect-src.
title: Yuneta Agent Console

metadata.description: Web console to operate yuneta agents: control-plane CLI, treedb, stats.
metadata.keywords: yuneta agent console cli treedb stats gui

csp_connect_src: _comment: This is an operator console that connects to AGENTS and AUTH servers the USER configures at runtime (in Settings). A fixed origin allowlist cannot work for that, so we allow the wss: and https: schemes broadly — the user controls which hosts it talks to. ws://localhost is for local dev only (mixed content blocks plain ws from the HTTPS prod app anyway).
